summary: The batch exhibits a high level of redundancy in phrasing and structure, particularly in refund requests and complaints, with many samples using similar constructions and expressions. There is a lack of nuanced scenarios and diverse vocabulary across the texts.
missing_modes: edge_case scenarios for refund requests and complaints
more informal styles in technical problems
overrepresented_modes: formal style in refund requests and general questions
fragmented style in complaints and technical problems
recommendations: Encourage the generation of more varied sentence structures and vocabulary, especially for refund requests and complaints.
Include more edge case scenarios and emotional expressions in the complaints category.
Diversify the styles used in technical problems to include more informal and emotional tones.
